jokes.text: Okay, you can turn the music off. I already shot my wad. Off. No, that's tape.
jokes.setup: Gob says he 'shot his wad' seemingly meaning he's finished speaking
jokes.punchline: The phrase has sexual connotations and he's confused about tape vs music
jokes.explanation: Classic Gob double entendre with perfect character obliviousness

jokes.text: I have got a quick way for us to literally be showered with money.
jokes.setup: Gob promises a business opportunity
jokes.punchline: Uses 'literally' incorrectly for a metaphorical phrase
jokes.explanation: Typical Gob misuse of language, mildly amusing

jokes.text: I think they're called Colombians. Oh, I forgot, we're being politically correct now.
jokes.setup: Michael corrects Gob's geographical error
jokes.punchline: Gob thinks basic accuracy is political correctness
jokes.explanation: Perfect character moment showing Gob's ignorance masked as political stance

jokes.text: A Colombian cartel that won't kidnap and kill you. I underlined 'won't,' 'cause it makes the competition look like...
jokes.setup: Gob presents a business slogan
jokes.punchline: The slogan emphasizes they WON'T commit violent crimes as a selling point
jokes.explanation: Brilliantly absurd marketing logic that's both dark and character-perfect

jokes.text: Translation: Wish I'd thought of that. Nice translating, Dad.
jokes.setup: George Sr. says 'Translation' before giving his real opinion
jokes.punchline: Michael calls out the obvious non-translation
jokes.explanation: Clean meta joke about the obvious non-translation

jokes.text: It's not stupid. You're stupid. Nice pout, Dad.
jokes.setup: Gob defends his idea with childish retort
jokes.punchline: George Sr. calls out Gob's petulant behavior like a child
jokes.explanation: Simple but effective character dynamic showing family dysfunction

jokes.text: If I didn't have a live dove in my pants right now, I would leap across this table
jokes.setup: Gob threatens physical confrontation
jokes.punchline: He's prevented by having a live dove in his pants
jokes.explanation: Perfectly absurd Gob moment that's completely in character and unexpected

jokes.text: You and half of Orange County.
jokes.setup: Lindsay mentions having video of Michael and Gob fighting
jokes.punchline: Implies their fights were so public/frequent that everyone recorded them
jokes.explanation: Good escalation joke about the ubiquity of their fighting

jokes.text: Boyfights 2, A Boyfights Cookout, and Backseat Boyfights: The Trip to Uncle Jack's 70th
jokes.setup: George Sr. franchised videos of his sons fighting
jokes.punchline: Elaborate sequel titles like a movie franchise
jokes.explanation: Brilliant escalation of the absurd concept with specific, funny titles

jokes.text: Very secret. He doesn't even know, does he? He has not known of it. That's correct.
jokes.setup: Lindsay claims to have a secret thing with Bob Loblaw
jokes.punchline: It's so secret the other person doesn't know about it
jokes.explanation: Good character moment showing Lindsay's delusion about relationships

jokes.text: Why won't you (bleep) me?!
jokes.setup: Lindsay's 'little hints' to Bob Loblaw
jokes.punchline: Her 'hint' is extremely direct and inappropriate
jokes.explanation: Perfect escalation from 'little hints' to extremely direct approach

jokes.text: Well, our copy boy's very striking, but he often has toner on his fingers. I meant another lawyer.
jokes.setup: Lindsay asks Bob to recommend somebody else
jokes.punchline: He misunderstands and recommends the copy boy instead of another lawyer
jokes.explanation: Decent misdirection joke with Bob's literal interpretation

jokes.text: Perhaps you can talk to Maeby while you're getting your eyebrows plucked. It'll look like your eyes are watering 'cause you're sad.
jokes.setup: Lindsay needs to tell Maeby about the divorce while getting eyebrows plucked
jokes.punchline: The physical pain will mask the emotional reaction
jokes.explanation: Clever practical observation about masking emotions

jokes.text: Que? What's Spanish for 'I know you speak English'?
jokes.setup: Worker says 'Que?' to Lucille
jokes.punchline: Michael calls out the obvious pretense in Spanish
jokes.explanation: Sharp callback to common workplace pretense

jokes.text: Mom, if you're gonna speak to these guys like this, you might want to sleep with one eye open.
jokes.setup: Lucille is being rude to workers
jokes.punchline: Michael suggests they might retaliate violently
jokes.explanation: Solid threat joke about mistreating workers

jokes.text: Hope you kept your punch card, you're about due for a free one.
jokes.setup: Lucille mentions getting a face-lift
jokes.punchline: Michael implies she's had so many she should get a loyalty discount
jokes.explanation: Good loyalty card joke applied to plastic surgery

jokes.text: Mom, however, will not have a choice.
jokes.setup: Michael warned workers they'd sleep with one eye open
jokes.punchline: Points out Lucille literally can't close her eyes after surgery
jokes.explanation: Excellent callback that adds dark medical reality to the threat

jokes.text: That ship sailed 35 years ago.
jokes.setup: Michael asks George Sr. to help get rid of Gob
jokes.punchline: Implies he should have gotten rid of Gob as a baby
jokes.explanation: Darkly funny parental regret delivered matter-of-factly

jokes.text: Boyfights? Luchas del Muchachos. Si, Luchas del Muchachos! We had this video. Si!
jokes.setup: Workers recognize the Boyfights concept
jokes.punchline: The tapes were apparently popular in Latin America
jokes.explanation: Funny escalation showing the videos had international distribution

jokes.text: Yo quiero leche, yo quiero leche del madre. Even though I'm so old.
jokes.setup: Worker is quoting from Baby Buster shorts
jokes.punchline: Buster wanting mother's milk despite being adult
jokes.explanation: Creepy but funny reference to Buster's disturbing relationship with Lucille

jokes.text: Okay, I'll just take off this cheap fake, huh? And we going to put on this sign. Beautiful. You like?
jokes.setup: Iraqi toy store owner wants to deter shoplifting
jokes.punchline: Wants Buster to remove his prosthetic and wear a threatening sign
jokes.explanation: Dark humor about exploiting disability for deterrent effect

jokes.text: They only wanted me because I had one hand. And I won't do it! That's not the way Mother is raising me.
jokes.setup: Buster refuses the degrading job
jokes.punchline: Still refers to being 'raised' by mother as an adult
jokes.explanation: Perfect Buster moment showing his stunted development

jokes.text: Of course, I left my hand there, also.
jokes.setup: Buster stole the sign to show the store owner
jokes.punchline: Casually mentions leaving his prosthetic hand behind
jokes.explanation: Perfectly understated delivery of absurd consequence

jokes.text: That's a bloodsucker? It looks like Alf.
jokes.setup: Movie monster is supposed to be scary
jokes.punchline: It resembles the harmless sitcom alien Alf
jokes.explanation: Good visual comparison joke contrasting scary with cute

jokes.text: That's how Tony Wonder lost a nut.
jokes.setup: Gob explains why he won't let the dove get hungry
jokes.punchline: References magician losing a testicle to a bird
jokes.explanation: Perfectly absurd magician reference with dark implication

jokes.text: And I'm trying to get her to renounce God and (bleep) me.
jokes.setup: Gob's Christian girlfriend wants him to be better
jokes.punchline: His goal is the opposite - corrupt her
jokes.explanation: Perfect Gob selfishness framed as mutual improvement

jokes.text: Well, as always, Gob, a mixed bag there, but the middle part sounded pretty admirable for a second
jokes.setup: Gob's speech about wanting to be better and corrupt his girlfriend
jokes.punchline: Michael acknowledges only the brief good part
jokes.explanation: Good straight-man response to Gob's contradictory speech

jokes.text: If you feel something moving down there, it's just the bird. I know it.
jokes.setup: Brothers hug after making up
jokes.punchline: Gob warns Michael about the dove in his pants during embrace
jokes.explanation: Awkward callback that ruins a tender moment

jokes.text: Don't call it that.
jokes.setup: Gob refers to Orange County as 'the O.C.'
jokes.punchline: Michael's automatic correction
jokes.explanation: Series running gag, gets points for consistency

jokes.text: You're just scared of a little competish.
jokes.setup: Michael complains about business cannibalization
jokes.punchline: Gob shortens 'competition' cutely
jokes.explanation: Typical Gob made-up word, mildly charming

jokes.text: Don't tell them! Stick it in the what?!
jokes.setup: Michael starts explaining banana recipe
jokes.punchline: Gob desperately stops him from revealing trade secrets
jokes.explanation: Good escalation as Gob treats simple recipe like state secrets

jokes.text: We'll be the laughingstock of the boardwalk.
jokes.setup: Michael says they'll have the last laugh
jokes.punchline: George Michael misunderstands and uses similar phrase wrongly
jokes.explanation: Sweet character moment showing George Michael's confusion

jokes.text: Well, we'll fudge that.
jokes.setup: New lawyer starts Monday
jokes.punchline: Casual admission of practicing law illegally
jokes.explanation: Casual corruption delivered matter-of-factly

jokes.text: Don't call it that. Okay.
jokes.setup: Tobias calls Orange County 'the O.C.'
jokes.punchline: Immediate correction and compliance
jokes.explanation: Running gag callback, less impact than first instance

jokes.text: You want me to be explicit?
jokes.setup: Legal discussion about explicit promises
jokes.punchline: Tobias misunderstands 'explicit' in sexual context
jokes.explanation: Classic Tobias double entendre misunderstanding

jokes.text: You better not lock it! I'll kick it in!
jokes.setup: Buster needs to sleep with his mother
jokes.punchline: Threatens violence if locked out of her room
jokes.explanation: Disturbing mother-son dynamic with aggressive threat

jokes.text: I was like, 'Make it two weeks! See if I care!'
jokes.setup: Doctor says no kissing mother's face for one week
jokes.punchline: Buster pretends he doesn't want to kiss her anyway
jokes.explanation: Perfect Buster denial about inappropriate mother relationship

jokes.text: Sorry, no refunds. And that's why you don't take your foot out of its wrapper.
jokes.setup: Someone at prosthetics shop
jokes.punchline: Treating prosthetic foot like returnable merchandise
jokes.explanation: Good absurdist take on medical equipment as consumer goods

jokes.text: Even if it means me never taking a job again. A pulse makes him worth it.
jokes.setup: Buster won't take jobs that exploit his disability
jokes.punchline: Michael points out any job would be an improvement
jokes.explanation: Sharp comeback about Buster's unemployment being the real issue

jokes.text: Hello? George Michael? I'm thirsty.
jokes.setup: Maeby hears a noise and investigates
jokes.punchline: Post-surgery Lucille's face is the monster she's been looking for
jokes.explanation: Brilliant visual payoff connecting Maeby's work problem with Lucille's surgery

jokes.text: Is my name 'Champ'?
jokes.setup: Michael calls George Michael 'Champ'
jokes.punchline: George Michael questions the sudden nickname
jokes.explanation: Good character moment showing George Michael's literal nature

jokes.text: Don't worry, these young beauties have been nowhere near the bananas.
jokes.setup: Gob introduces strippers to sell bananas
jokes.punchline: Emphasizes they haven't contaminated the food
jokes.explanation: Absurd food safety concern about strippers

jokes.text: Dad, are they strippers? If I know your uncle, they're at least strippers.
jokes.setup: George Michael asks about the women
jokes.punchline: Michael's matter-of-fact assessment of Gob's standards
jokes.explanation: Michael's resigned knowledge of Gob's business methods

jokes.text: But it was less entertaining than you might imagine-- no matter what music was put under it.
jokes.setup: Escalating banana stand war
jokes.punchline: Narrator admits the montage isn't actually exciting
jokes.explanation: Clever meta commentary on TV montage conventions

jokes.text: It was kind of funny to 'Yellow Submarine,' but who could afford it?
jokes.setup: Different music might help the montage
jokes.punchline: Beatles songs are too expensive to license
jokes.explanation: Sharp industry joke about music licensing costs

jokes.text: A Hefty bagfull of pesos.
jokes.setup: Michael asks what they're fighting for
jokes.punchline: Gob's profits are literally in a garbage bag and foreign currency
jokes.explanation: Good visual that reveals the money laundering scheme

jokes.text: 'The only scary thing about a one-arm man trying to scare someone is the fact...' '...that he feels that his one arm is good for nothing but trying to scare somebody.' It's upside down.
jokes.setup: Buster wears a button with anti-disability exploitation message
jokes.punchline: He put it on upside down, defeating the purpose
jokes.explanation: Good physical comedy undermining Buster's activism

jokes.text: Let's just hope they don't try to get even by trying to 'cirsumventing' the law.
jokes.setup: George Sr. warns about Colombian retaliation
jokes.punchline: Mispronounces 'circumventing' while threatening kidnapping
jokes.explanation: Typical George Sr. mispronunciation while being threatening

jokes.text: But we are Guatemalan. Won't he know the difference? I think anything south of San Diego will be just fine.
jokes.setup: Workers worry about posing as Colombians
jokes.punchline: Michael reveals his geographical ignorance/prejudice
jokes.explanation: Good character flaw reveal through casual prejudice

jokes.text: Between a dad and his... his favorite son.
jokes.setup: George Sr. asks Gob to keep a secret
jokes.punchline: Manipulates him by calling him the favorite son
jokes.explanation: Classic manipulation tactic revealing family dysfunction

jokes.text: Gob Bluth doesn't cave. Yeah, you just did for me. Well, you asked me to, so I thought... Go. Go. Go. It's fine.
jokes.setup: Gob claims he doesn't cave to pressure
jokes.punchline: Immediately proves he just caved by agreeing to help George Sr.
jokes.explanation: Perfect immediate contradiction showing Gob's weakness

jokes.text: Blah-Blah-Blah. At 8:30, unless you want to sit at the bar.
jokes.setup: Lawyer calls Lindsay's date 'Mister Blah-Blah-Blah'
jokes.punchline: Lindsay thinks he said 'Bob Loblaw' and gives dinner details
jokes.explanation: Brilliant wordplay connecting 'blah blah blah' to 'Bob Loblaw'

jokes.text: Of course-- the 'Bob Loblaw Law Blog.' Wow. You, sir, are a mouthful!
jokes.setup: Bob Loblaw mentions his law blog
jokes.punchline: Tobias comments on the name being hard to say with unintentional innuendo
jokes.explanation: Perfect wordplay with Tobias's oblivious double entendre - 'mouthful' comment about tongue twister name

jokes.text: While Tobias was trying to get his mouth around Bob Loblaw
jokes.setup: Tobias struggling with the name pronunciation
jokes.punchline: Narrator doubles down on the innuendo
jokes.explanation: Good callback that extends the wordplay joke

jokes.text: Who did that for you, Industrial Light and Magic? Kopelson Plastic and Silicon.
jokes.setup: Movie executive impressed by monster makeup
jokes.punchline: It's actually Lucille's plastic surgery, not special effects
jokes.explanation: Excellent payoff connecting plastic surgery to special effects

jokes.text: Oh, I forgot my iPod.
jokes.setup: George Sr. is being 'kidnapped'
jokes.punchline: He's so casual about it he worries about entertainment
jokes.explanation: Perfect character moment showing George Sr.'s lack of fear during fake kidnapping

jokes.text: Put on the sound effects! Put on the sound effects! CD... CD one! CD one! Track two! Track two!
jokes.setup: Michael trying to create dramatic helicopter scene
jokes.punchline: Desperately calling for sound effects like amateur theater
jokes.explanation: Good cringe comedy about amateur production values

jokes.text: He's good. He was a Groundling.
jokes.setup: Guatemalan worker's acting
jokes.punchline: Michael appreciates his improv training
jokes.explanation: Callback to worker's acting background during fake kidnapping

jokes.text: And that's why you don't teach your father a lesson.
jokes.setup: J. Walter Weatherman's arm appears to be shot off
jokes.punchline: His signature lesson-teaching line adapted to this situation
jokes.explanation: Perfect callback to the series' recurring lesson structure

jokes.text: And that's why you don't pit Gob and me against each other.
jokes.setup: George Sr. reveals his counter-lesson plan
jokes.punchline: Another 'that's why you don't' lesson, showing he orchestrated everything
jokes.explanation: Excellent escalation showing George Sr. out-manipulated his sons

jokes.text: And that's why you don't use a one-armed person to scare someone.
jokes.setup: Buster's hand comes off during the chaos
jokes.punchline: Final lesson about not exploiting disability
jokes.explanation: Perfect culmination bringing together all lesson themes with meta commentary

jokes.text: I'm thirsty... Gangee.
jokes.setup: Movie trailer for Maeby's new horror film
jokes.punchline: Lucille's post-surgery face is the monster, asking for water
jokes.explanation: Good payoff showing Maeby's movie success using Lucille's face

jokes.text: I'm thirsty... Gangee.
jokes.setup: Movie preview for Maeby's horror film
jokes.punchline: George Michael's banana suit voice becomes movie monster
jokes.explanation: Perfect callback escalation where banana suit discomfort becomes horror movie success
